title: Diamond's Cloud Layers
description: Small mod that adds layered cloud rendering.
body:
![Cloud Layers Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3992a92d061ca6bf5394deef70d8ccdfc7f30bd4.png)

Cloud Layers is a small mod that makes clouds render in multiple layers. The layer count, transparency, and spacing can be changed in the config. You can also make individual layers render in 2D.

### I strongly recommend using the config to adjust the mod to your liking! The default settings are just for example purposes.

If you have any questions or just want to hang out, join the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/RHpygkc9dG).
